---
title: 'Technical Appendix "Women in STEM"'
date: today
author:
  - name: Jacob Hamel-Mottiez
    id: jc
    orcid: https://orcid.org/0009-0007-3666-908X
    email: jacob.hamel-Mottiez@mail.mcgill.ca
    affiliation: 
      - name: McGill University

code-links: 
  - icon: github
    text: Github
    href: https://github.com/JacobHamelMottiez

abstract: This file is the technical appendix for my article "Women in STEM". For any questions or issues, please email the author.

format: 
  html: default

code-fold: true 
code-summary: "Show Code"
number-sections: true
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
toc-location: left

theme:
  light: flatly
  dark: darkly

keywords:
  - Women 
  - STEM
  - Quebec

abstract-title: What is this file about?

---

# Packages
```{r}
#| warning: false
#| code-fold: false

library(gt)
library(here)
library(forcats)
library(plotly)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(pubmedR)
library(dplyr)
library(gghighlight)
```


```{r}
wis.data <- read_csv("C:/Users/jacob/OneDrive - Université Laval/Desktop/PROJECTS/Women_in_STEM/Data/theses-canada_2026-06-19.csv", skip = 2)
```



::: {.callout-warning}
## Incomplete dataset
It is weird, I only get 5000 results, when there should be 797 572. 
:::



```{r}
wis.data |> select(Titre)
```
